title: Spicy Marinated Tofu Empanadas
description: A twist on traditional Thai street food, this recipe combines the crunch of empanadas with the spicy flavors of marinated tofu. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Roll out empanada dough to desired thickness.
Cut out circles of dough for empanadas.
Place a small amount of marinated tofu in the center of each dough circle.
Fold dough over filling and press edges to seal.
Brush tops with vegetable oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Place empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While empanadas are baking, heat pungent Thai chili paste in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add soy sauce and honey to the chili paste and stir to combine.
Once empanadas are done, brush with the spicy sauce and garnish with fresh cilantro.
